title: Demographic and clinical characteristics of New York City Health + Hospitals HIV Heart Failure (NYC4H cohort): cohort profile.
author: Chen YY Borkowski P Nazarenko N Biavati L Parker M Chowdhury I Vargas-Pena C Bhakta S Garg V Bock J Faillace RT Palaiodimos L
content:
S-EPMC11529568 PMC11529568 Demographic and clinical characteristics of New York City Health + Hospitals HIV Heart Failure (NYC4H cohort): cohort profile.

Purpose

Studies have elucidated that heart failure (HF) in people living with HIV manifests differently when compared with HF cases
